articles.title: Villa Mexico Cafe is not closing after all
articles.description:
A week earlier, the owners of a Boston staple announced it may be closing for good due to unpaid rent and declining foot traffic.

The post Villa Mexico Cafe is not closing after all appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Villa Mexico Cafe will remain open despite previous closure announcement.
Owners cited unpaid rent and declining foot traffic as concerns last week.
Local patrons can continue enjoying the cafe's offerings without interruption.

articles.title: Committee sues former GM over corporate theft of more than $1M: lawsuit
articles.description:
Pier 50, LLC, which owns Committee, is suing Demetri Tsolakis, the restaurant's former general manager and current CEO of Xenia Greek Hospitality.

The post Committee sues former GM over corporate theft of more than $1M: lawsuit appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Committee sues former GM Demetri Tsolakis for over $1 million in theft.
Lawsuit filed by Pier 50, LLC, which owns Committee restaurant.
Potential financial repercussions for local employees and business operations in Boston.

articles.title: Roman Anthony calls himself out for ‘bad baseball’ after latest poor throw
articles.description:
"It’s awful to be a part of. I feel like it’s on me.”

The post Roman Anthony calls himself out for ‘bad baseball’ after latest poor throw appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Roman Anthony admits to poor performance after a critical throw error against the Brewers.
The Boston Red Sox rookie expressed disappointment in his play on April 7, 2026.
Fans are concerned about the team's defense impacting their season performance.

articles.title: Red Sox’ Willson Contreras warns Brewers he’ll ‘take one of them out’ if he’s hit by another pitch ​
articles.description:
"They always say, ‘I’m not trying to hit you.’ That gets old."

The post Red Sox’ Willson Contreras warns Brewers he’ll ‘take one of them out’ if he’s hit by another pitch ​ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox catcher Willson Contreras warns Brewers about retaliation for being hit by pitches.
Contreras expressed frustration over repeated hit-by-pitches during games against Milwaukee.
Boston fans may see increased tensions in upcoming games between the Red Sox and Brewers.

articles.title: Home of the Week: Dorchester condo with city views lists for $1.25m as owners head to South End
articles.description:

Young and Gary J. Sullivan’s residential resume includes a nice place in a Chinatown high-rise, a […]

The post Home of the Week: Dorchester condo with city views lists for $1.25m as owners head to South End appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Dorchester condo at 27 Salcombe St. lists for $1.25 million as owners relocate.
Condo features 1,881 square feet with 2 bedrooms and 2.5 baths, built in 2017.
Monthly fees are $240, with annual taxes of $6,146 under residential exemption.
